untranslatable_reason: Signal requires identification of 'previous rally high' and 'previous decline low' which are swing/pivot levels not directly available in the indicator set. The 10% separation threshold and 20% reversal confirmation thresholds cannot be precisely encoded without custom swing detection logic. Used prev_high/prev_low as proxies, but this does not capture the true intent of identifying multi-bar swing extrema.
translation_notes: Attempted translation uses prev_high/prev_low as simplified breakout levels, but the signal's core logic depends on identifying swing highs/lows from previous complete rallies or declines, which requires swing detection not present in allowed indicators. Donchian channels (dc_upper, dc_lower) could approximate recent extrema but do not capture 'previous rally/decline' structure. The 10% and 20% thresholds are set as stop_loss_pct and implied in target_regime but cannot be strictly enforced without additional custom parameters.
